flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Trinity International University-Illinois fell 88% between 2021 and 2024 (476 → 55).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Trinity International University-Illinois fell 79% between 2021 and 2024 (59.0% → 12.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trinity International University-Illinois fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trinity International University-Illinois fell 63% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.3k → $12.3k).
